creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
OK now that was just rude.
I have some 20 or more emails from pkg-fallout@ for
failure to obtain the source for this port.
Because it worked (each) of you once. I have to
continue to take pkg-fallout? The patch (cure)
is trivial. Please commit it.

Thank you for your attention to this.

--Chris
